name: Assamite
weaknessDescription: A hunger for the vitae of other Cainites; can lead to dangerous addiction.
description: Judges and assassins from the fortress of Alamut, seeking to purge the unworthy.

name: Assamita
weaknessDescription: Un hambre por la sangre de otros Cainitas que puede llevar a una adicción peligrosa.
description: Jueces y asesinos de la fortaleza de Alamut, buscando purgar a los indignos.

name: Brujah
weaknessDescription: The difficulty to resist Frenzy is increased by 2.
description: Warrior-scholars and philosophers who fight for the ideals of a fallen Carthage.

name: Brujah
weaknessDescription: La dificultad para resistir el Frenesí aumenta en 2.
description: Guerreros eruditos y filósofos que luchan por los ideales de una Cartago caída.

name: Cappadocian
weaknessDescription: Appear as walking corpses; skin is cold and deathly pale.
description: The clan of death, seeking to bridge the gap between life and the final reward.

name: Capadocio
weaknessDescription: Parecen cadáveres vivientes; su piel es fría y mortalmente pálida.
description: El clan de la muerte, buscando cerrar la brecha entre la vida y la recompensa final.

name: Gangrel
weaknessDescription: Gain an animal feature (fur, ears, musk) after every Frenzy.
description: Wild and free, the Gangrel roam the untamed lands outside the city walls.

name: Gangrel
weaknessDescription: Obtienen un rasgo animal (pelaje, orejas, olor) después de cada Frenesí.
description: Salvajes y libres, los Gangrel recorren las tierras indómitas fuera de las murallas.

name: Lasombra
weaknessDescription: Do not cast a reflection in mirrors, water, or any reflective surface.
description: Masters of shadows and the Abyss, they lead the Church and the courts from within.

name: Lasombra
weaknessDescription: No proyectan reflejo en espejos, agua ni ninguna superficie reflectante.
description: Maestros de las sombras y el Abismo, lideran la Iglesia y las cortes desde dentro.

name: Malkavian
weaknessDescription: Must start with at least one permanent Derangement.
description: Oracles and madmen whose minds are shattered by insight.

name: Malkavian
weaknessDescription: Deben comenzar con al menos un Trastorno permanente.
description: Oráculos y locos cuyas mentes están fragmentadas por la visión.

name: Nosferatu
weaknessDescription: Appearance is always 0 and can never be increased.
description: Deformed spies who hide in the sewers and shadows.

name: Nosferatu
weaknessDescription: Apariencia siempre es 0 y nunca puede aumentarse.
description: Espías deformes que se esconden en las alcantarillas y sombras.

name: Ravnos
weaknessDescription: Must indulge in a specific criminal vice frequently.
description: Masters of illusion and trickery from distant lands.

name: Ravnos
weaknessDescription: Deben entregarse a un vicio criminal específico con frecuencia.
description: Maestros de la ilusión y el engaño provenientes de tierras lejanas.

name: Followers of Set
weaknessDescription: Suffer double damage from sunlight and take penalties in bright light.
description: Serpent-cultists who serve the dark god of the Nile.

name: Seguidores de Set
weaknessDescription: Sufren doble daño por luz solar y penalizaciones en entornos brillantes.
description: Cultistas de la serpiente que sirven al dios oscuro del Nilo.

name: Toreador
weaknessDescription: Become entranced by beautiful objects or people for hours.
description: Artisans and hedonists of the high courts.

name: Toreador
weaknessDescription: Quedan embelesados por objetos o personas hermosas durante horas.
description: Artesanos y hedonistas de las altas cortes.

name: Tremere
weaknessDescription: One step closer to a Blood Bond with the Council of Seven by default.
description: Sorcerers who used alchemy to steal the blood of Saulot, becoming Cainites.

name: Tremere
weaknessDescription: Un paso más cerca del Vínculo de Sangre con el Consejo de los Siete por defecto.
description: Hechiceros que usaron alquimia para robar la sangre de Saulot, convirtiéndose en Cainitas.

name: Tzimisce
weaknessDescription: Must sleep in soil from their birthplace or lose half their dice pools.
description: Monstrous lords of the East who treat their flesh and that of others as clay.

name: Tzimisce
weaknessDescription: Deben dormir en tierra de su lugar de nacimiento o pierden la mitad de su reserva de dados.
description: Monstruosos señores del Este que tratan su carne y la de otros como arcilla.

name: Ventrue
weaknessDescription: Can only feed from a specific demographic (e.g. Priests, Virgins).
description: The nobility of the night, administrators of the feudal structure of Cainite society.

name: Ventrue
weaknessDescription: Solo pueden alimentarse de un grupo específico (ej. Sacerdotes, Vírgenes).
description: La nobleza de la noche, administradores de la estructura feudal de la sociedad Cainita.

name: Ahrimanes
weaknessDescription: They cannot create new vampires; they must recruit existing Gangrel females.
description: An all-female bloodline that renounces their clan to bond with animal spirits.

name: Ahrimanes
weaknessDescription: No pueden crear nuevos vampiros; deben reclutar hembras Gangrel existentes.
description: Una línea de sangre exclusivamente femenina que renuncia a su clan para vincularse con espíritus animales.

name: Anda
weaknessDescription: Suffer damage if they sleep in the same location more than three nights.
description: The golden horde of the night, riding across the steppes in the wake of Genghis Khan.

name: Anda
weaknessDescription: Sufren daño si duermen en el mismo lugar más de tres noches.
description: La horda dorada de la noche, cabalgando por las estepas tras la huella de Gengis Kan.

name: Baali
weaknessDescription: Suffer double damage from holy symbols and enter Rötschreck easily near True Faith.
description: Corruptors who serve ancient, slumbering horrors beyond the reach of God.

name: Baali
weaknessDescription: Sufren doble daño por símbolos sagrados y entran en Rötschreck ante la Fe Verdadera.
description: Corruptores que sirven a horrores antiguos y durmientes más allá del alcance de Dios.

name: Bonsam
weaknessDescription: They can only feed from those who have committed a crime or broken a taboo.
description: West African predators who hide in the high canopy of trees, dropping on their prey.

name: Bonsam
weaknessDescription: Solo pueden alimentarse de quienes han cometido un crimen o roto un tabú.
description: Depredadores de África Occidental que se esconden en las copas de los árboles.

name: Children of Osiris
weaknessDescription: Suffer severe penalties to using the Blood for physical feats; focused on Bardo.
description: Vampires seeking to restore their humanity through discipline and the Egyptian rites of Osiris.

name: Hijos de Osiris
weaknessDescription: Sufren severas penalizaciones al usar la Sangre para proezas físicas; enfocados en Bardo.
description: Vampiros que buscan restaurar su humanidad a través de la disciplina y los ritos egipcios de Osiris.

name: Danava
weaknessDescription: Cannot feed from anyone of lower status than themselves.
description: Indian Ventrue who believe themselves to be priests and masters of the gods.

name: Danava
weaknessDescription: No pueden alimentarse de nadie que tenga un estatus inferior al suyo.
description: Ventrue indios que se creen sacerdotes y maestros de los dioses.

name: Gargoyle
weaknessDescription: Appearance is always 0. Two steps closer to a Blood Bond with creators.
description: Flesh-crafted guardians created by Tremere magi to protect their chantries.

name: Gárgola
weaknessDescription: La apariencia siempre es 0. Dos pasos más cerca de un Vínculo de Sangre con sus creadores.
description: Guardianes moldeados por los magos Tremere para proteger sus capillas.

name: Giovanni
weaknessDescription: Their bite causes excruciating pain rather than ecstasy, often killing the victim.
description: A merchant family of Venice recently embraced into the Clan of Death.

name: Giovanni
weaknessDescription: Su mordisco causa un dolor insoportable en lugar de éxtasis, a menudo matando a la víctima.
description: Una familia de mercaderes de Venecia recientemente abrazada en el Clan de la Muerte.

name: Impundulu
weaknessDescription: Suffer double damage from the first hour of sunrise.
description: Witch-vampires of African lore, serving as the avian heralds of dark gods.

name: Impundulu
weaknessDescription: Sufren doble daño durante la primera hora del amanecer.
description: Vampiros-brujos de la mitología africana, actuando como heraldos de dioses oscuros.

name: Kiasyd
weaknessDescription: Standing over seven feet tall with coal-black eyes; suffer penalties from iron.
description: Scholarly and aloof, these Lasombra offshoots have been altered by fae blood.

name: Kiasyd
weaknessDescription: Miden más de dos metros y tienen ojos negros; sufren penalizaciones al contacto con el hierro.
description: Eruditos y distantes, estos vástagos de Lasombra han sido alterados por sangre de hada.

name: Lamia
weaknessDescription: Bites transmit a fatal plague; feeding is a dangerous risk for mortals.
description: Protectors of the Graverobbers who believe themselves descendants of Lilith.

name: Lamia
weaknessDescription: Sus mordiscos transmiten una plaga fatal; alimentarse es un riesgo para los mortales.
description: Protectoras de los Ladrones de Tumbas que se creen descendientes de Lilith.

name: Lhiannan
weaknessDescription: Easily detected by any supernatural sense; carry a visible aura of spirits.
description: Pagan remnants of the British Isles who command the power of the blood-stained earth.

name: Lhiannan
weaknessDescription: Detectados fácilmente por cualquier sentido sobrenatural; portan un aura visible de espíritus.
description: Remanentes paganos de las Islas Británicas que dominan el poder de la tierra.

name: Nagaraja
weaknessDescription: Must consume actual human flesh in addition to blood to survive.
description: Wizards from the East who escaped the Underworld, bearing sharpened teeth.

name: Nagaraja
weaknessDescription: Deben consumir carne humana real además de sangre para sobrevivir.
description: Hechiceros de Oriente que escaparon del Inframundo, con dientes afilados.

name: Niktuku
weaknessDescription: So monstrous that even other Nosferatu recoil; Appearance is always 0.
description: The chosen of Baba Yaga, hunters of their own kind within the Nosferatu clan.

name: Niktuku
weaknessDescription: Tan monstruosos que incluso otros Nosferatu retroceden; la Apariencia siempre es 0.
description: Los elegidos de Baba Yaga, cazadores de su propia especie dentro del clan Nosferatu.

name: Ramanga
weaknessDescription: Do not cast a reflection in any surface; suffer from intense claustrophobia.
description: Shadow-mages of the Madagascar courts, advisors to mortal and immortal kings alike.

name: Ramanga
weaknessDescription: No proyectan reflejo; sufren de una intensa claustrofobia.
description: Magos de las sombras de las cortes de Madagascar, consejeros de reyes.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: May only feed from those who give blood voluntarily.
description: A clan of saints marked by a third eye, now hunted by the Tremere.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: Solo pueden alimentarse de quienes ofrecen su sangre voluntariamente.
description: Un clan de santos marcados por un tercer ojo, ahora cazados por los Tremere.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: May only feed from those who have fallen in honorable combat.
description: The martial branch of Saulot's line, dedicated to hunting demons.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: Solo pueden alimentarse de quienes han caído en combate honorable.
description: La rama marcial de la estirpe de Saulot, dedicada a la caza de demonios.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: Must remain stationary while using their sensory disciplines or lose all bonuses.
description: The secretive observers of the Salubri, gathering lore from across the world.

name: Salubri
weaknessDescription: Deben permanecer quietos al usar sus disciplinas sensoriales o pierden sus bonificaciones.
description: Los observadores secretos de los Salubri, recolectando conocimientos de todo el mundo.

name: True Brujah
weaknessDescription: Difficulty of all Conscience and Empathy rolls is increased by 2.
description: Claiming to be the true descendants, they command the flow of time.

name: Verdaderos Brujah
weaknessDescription: La dificultad de las tiradas de Conciencia y Empatía aumenta en 2.
description: Aseguran ser los verdaderos descendientes, dominando el flujo del tiempo.
